tags.description: Manage customer contacts and address book entries for a website: create, read, update, delete, and query contacts; maintain addresses for shipping and fulfillment.
tags.name: Contacts

400.description: contactIds shouldn't be empty or too big, groupBy should have a valid value

post.summary: Retrieve transaction summaries grouped by contact

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts for the website. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS_READ, WEBSITE_CONTACTS, WEBSITE_PROFILES_READ, or WEBSITE_PROFILES.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Invalid pagination parameters: page size out of range or cursor not from a previous response.

403.description: Forbidden. The access token does not include the OAuth scope required for this operation.

429.description: Too many requests. The rate limit for this endpoint has been exceeded.

post.description: Creates a new contact. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write).

400.description: Invalid input or malformed JSON.

403.description: Forbidden. The access token does not include the OAuth scope required for this operation.

409.description: A contact with the same unique fields already exists.

429.description: Too many requests. The rate limit for this endpoint has been exceeded.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

post.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts matching filters and sort options in the request body. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS_READ, WEBSITE_CONTACTS, WEBSITE_PROFILES_READ, or WEBSITE_PROFILES.

requestBody.description: Filters and sort order for the contact query.

200.description: A paginated list of contacts matching the query.

400.description: Invalid input or malformed JSON.

403.description: Forbidden. The access token does not include the OAuth scope required for this operation.

429.description: Too many requests. The rate limit for this endpoint has been exceeded.

409.description: The email address is already associated with another contact.

get.description: Returns paginated addresses for the contact. When there is at least one entry, exactly one is the default shipping address (defaultShippingAddressId and each entry's defaultShipping reflect this). The default shipping address (when present) is always included on the first page of results. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS_READ, WEBSITE_CONTACTS, WEBSITE_PROFILES_READ, or WEBSITE_PROFILES.

parameters.description: The contact's ID.
parameters.name: contactId
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

200.description: Paginated list of the contact's addresses. When there is at least one entry, the first page always includes the default shipping address, and defaultShippingAddressId identifies it. On later pages, addressBookEntries is the next slice only; defaultShippingAddressId is present only when the default shipping entry appears in that slice.

403.description: Forbidden. The access token does not include the OAuth scope required for this operation.

404.description: The contact was not found.

429.description: Too many requests. The rate limit for this endpoint has been exceeded.

post.description: Creates a new address book entry for the contact. If this is the contact's only address book entry after creation, it becomes the default shipping address even when defaultShipping is false. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write).

parameters.description: The contact's ID.
parameters.name: contactId
Authorization

parameters.description: User Agent

404.description: The contact was not found.

429.description: Too many requests. The rate limit for this endpoint has been exceeded.

delete.description: Deletes the address book entry for the contact. If the deleted entry was the default shipping address, another entry is assigned as the default. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write).

get.description: Retrieves information for products; products can be filtered within a date range and by product type. The response contains product information in a Product, up to 50 Products ordered by their modification date (modifiedOn), and supports dynamic cursors for pagination.

parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Bad request. The cursor parameter contains an invalid value.

405.description: Method not allowed. The Product requested is not a supported product type for this operation.

409.description: Conflict. The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

get.description: Retrieves real-time stock information for all product variants. Stock information is stored in an InventoryItem for each product variant. The response contains up to 50 InventoryItems and supports dynamic cursors for pagination.

parameters.description: Identifies where the next page of results should begin. Should be the value of pagination.nextPageCursor from a previous response. If not present or empty, the endpoint returns up to 50 InventoryItems.
parameters.name: cursor
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Bad Request. Type: INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR. The cursor parameter contains an invalid value.

404.description: Not found. The API version is not supported.

post.description: Adjusts stock quantities for product variants. Stock quantities can be added or subtracted, set with a given number, or marked as "unlimited". All quantity information is stored in InventoryItems.

parameters.description: Required for idempotent requests. Refer to the idempotency key guide for requirements.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

204.description: No content. The request was successful. If this is a request with a previously used Idempotency-Key, the previous operation was successful and no new changes were made.

400.description: Bad Request. Type: INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR. The request body is missing a required field or a field is an incorrect type; no operations were specified; greater than 50 operations were specified; one or more InventoryItems were not found; the same InventoryItem was referenced in more than one operation; a specified quantity is invalid; or the Idempotency-Key header is missing or invalid.

404.description: Not found. The API version is not supported.

409.description: Conflict. Type: CONFLICT. Possible subtypes: CONCURRENT_MODIFICATION (a request using the provided Idempotency-Key is already in progress, or a request modifying one or more of the specified InventoryItems could not be completed due to an overlapping request), INSUFFICIENT_STOCK (a decrement operation cannot be completed because the referenced InventoryItem does not have sufficient stock), STOCK_EXCEEDS_MAX (an increment operation cannot be completed because the referenced InventoryItem will exceed the maximum allowed stock), STOCK_NOT_TRACKED (an increment or decrement operation cannot be completed because the referenced InventoryItem has unlimited inventory).

get.description: Retrieves real-time stock information for specific product variants. Stock information is stored in an InventoryItem and up to 50 InventoryItems can be retrieved per request.

parameters.description: Specifies the InventoryItems to retrieve. Multiple InventoryItems can be retrieved by providing a comma-separated list: {id1},{id2}..., though the same sequence is not guaranteed in the response.
parameters.name: variantIdCsvs
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Bad Request. Type: INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR. ids specifies greater than 50 InventoryItems.

404.description: Not Found. Type: INVALID_REQUEST_ERROR. Subtype: INVALID_ARGUMENT. One or more requested InventoryItems were not found.

get.description: Retrieves information about all orders. Orders can be filtered by Customer ID and date ranges. The response contains order information in an Order, up to 50 Orders ordered by their modification date (modifiedOn), and supports dynamic cursors for pagination.

parameters.description: Used to filter Orders by Customer ID.
parameters.name: customerId

parameters.description: Time-boxes the request to Orders that were modified after a given ISO 8601 UTC date and time string (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ). Required when modifiedBefore is passed; cannot be used with cursor.
parameters.name: modifiedAfter

parameters.description: Time-boxes the request to Orders that were modified before a given ISO 8601 UTC date and time string (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ). Required when modifiedAfter is passed; cannot be used with cursor.
parameters.name: modifiedBefore

parameters.description: Identifies where the next page of results should begin. Should be the value of pagination.nextPageCursor from a previous response. Cannot be used with other parameters.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: Used to filter Orders by fulfillment status. Values may be PENDING, FULFILLED, or CANCELED.
parameters.name: fulfillmentStatus
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Bad request. The cursor parameter contains an invalid value, cursor was specified with other parameters, modifiedAfter or modifiedBefore is not a valid ISO 8601 UTC date and time string, modifiedBefore occurred before or at the same time as modifiedAfter, fulfillmentStatus is not one of the recognized values, or modifiedAfter or modifiedBefore was specified without the other parameter.

post.description: Creates an order using information from a third-party sales channel. A successful request creates an Order resource.

parameters.description: Idempotency key to prevent duplicate order creation.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Bad request. The request body does not conform to the required specification, the Idempotency-Key header is missing or invalid, or the provided Idempotency-Key has already been used by another request bearing a different body.

409.description: Conflict. A request using the provided Idempotency-Key is already in progress, or one or more specified product variants have insufficient stock.

429.description: Too many requests. The rate limit for this endpoint has been exceeded.

get.description: Retrieves information for a specific order. The response contains order information in an Order.

parameters.description: Specifies the Order to retrieve.
parameters.name: id
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Bad request. The id is not in the expected format.

404.description: The requested Order was not found.

post.description: Updates the status of a specific order to fulfilled, with options to include shipment information and send a customer notification.

parameters.description: Specifies the Order to update.
parameters.name: id
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

204.description: No content. The order was successfully fulfilled.

400.description: Bad request. One or more trackingUrls are invalid, or one or more required fields are missing.

404.description: The requested Order was not found.

409.description: Conflict. A request using the provided Order is already in progress.

get.description: Retrieves all financial transactions for orders and donations. Per order and donation, the response groups transactions into a Document, contains up to 50 Documents ordered by their modification date (modifiedOn), and supports dynamic cursors for pagination.

parameters.description: Identifies where the next page of results should begin. Should be the value of pagination.nextPageCursor from a previous response.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: Time-boxes the request to Documents that were modified after a given ISO 8601 UTC date and time string (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ).
parameters.name: modifiedAfter

parameters.description: Time-boxes the request to Documents that were modified before a given ISO 8601 UTC date and time string (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ).
parameters.name: modifiedBefore
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent

get.description: Retrieves all profiles; profiles can be filtered and sorted. The response contains up to 50 Profiles and supports dynamic cursors for pagination.

parameters.description: Identifies the sort direction of the result list; asc for ascending or dsc for descending. If not specified, the returned list is in descending order.
parameters.name: sortDirection

parameters.description: Identifies the sort field of the result list. Values include: createdOn, id, email, or lastName. If not specified, the returned list is sorted by id.
parameters.name: sortField

parameters.description: Semicolon separated list used to filter profile results. Values include: isCustomer and/or hasAccount, or email. The email filter cannot be used with isCustomer or hasAccount.
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Email address filter (URL-encoded, case insensitive).
parameters.name: email

parameters.description: Identifies where the next page of results should begin. Should be the value of pagination.nextPageCursor from a previous response. Cannot be used with other parameters.
parameters.name: cursor
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Bad request.

404.description: Not found. The API version is not supported.

get.description: Retrieves information for specific profiles. The response contains a list of up to 50 Profiles. Multiple Profiles can be retrieved by providing a comma-separated list of profile ids.

parameters.description: Specifies the profiles to retrieve. Multiple Profiles can be retrieved by providing a comma-separated list of profile ids.
parameters.name: profileIdCsvs
Authorization
parameters.description: API key or OAuth access token

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.description: User Agent

400.description: Bad request. ids specifies greater than 50 profiles.

404.description: Not found. One or more profiles were not found.

acceptsMarketing.description: Whether the contact accepts marketing email.

joinedOn.description: The date and time the contact was added to the marketing list.The value returned in the creation response is a near-real-time estimate; the Get Contact endpoint should be used to verify the exact persisted timestamp.

leftOn.description: The date and time the contact left Marketing list

AcceptsMarketing.description: Marketing subscription state for the contact's email.

AcceptsMarketingWithDate.description: Contact's marketing settings with joined on date

Address.description: Customer's shipping address provided at checkout or, for recurring subscription orders, the customer's current mailing address.

defaultShippingAddressId.description: The id of the address book entry that is the default shipping address.

AddressBook.description: Address settings for a contact. When there is at least one address book entry, exactly one is the default shipping address; default shipping address is always returned on the first page of paginated results).

defaultShipping.description: Whether this entry is the current default shipping address. When the contact has any address book entries, exactly one entry has this value set to true.

AddressBookEntry.description: An address book entry for a contact.

addressBookEntries.description: The address book entries that were created.

createdOn.description: Creation date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of the address book entries.

AddressCreateData.description: The address data for the created address book entries.

createdOn.description: Creation date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of this message.

topic.description:
Description of the event that triggered the notification.
* `order.create`        - always value for OrderCreatePayload.topic ref
* `order.update`        - always value for OrderUpdatePayload.topic

websiteId.description: Squarespace website id that triggered the notification.

addressBookEntryIds.description: The IDs of the deleted address book entries.

items.description: The IDs of the deleted address book entries.

deletedOn.description: Deletion date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of the address book entries.

AddressDeleteData.description: Identifiers and metadata for the deleted address book entries.

createdOn.description: Creation date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of this message.

websiteId.description: Squarespace website id that triggered the notification.

addressBookEntries.description: The address book entries after the update.

createdOn.description: Creation date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of the address book entries.

updatedOn.description: Last update date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of the address book entries.

AddressUpdateData.description: The address data after the update.

websiteId.description: Squarespace website id that triggered the notification.

ChangeListString.description: Optional; list of event topics that trigger a webhook notification. Possible values include: extension.uninstall, order.create, order.update.

ChangeMapStringString.description: Specifies attribute-value pairs for the variant. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

ChangeString.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

ChangeUpdateProductMeasurements.description: Measurements of the variant when it's shipped. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

createdOn.description: The date and time when the contact was created.

Description of the event that triggered the notification.
* `order.create`        - always value for OrderCreatePayload.topic ref
* `order.update`        - always value for OrderUpdatePayload.topic

* `contact.create`      - always value for ContactCreatePayload.topic
* `contact.update`      - always value for ContactUpdatePayload.topic
* `contact.delete`      - always value for ContactDeletePayload.topic
* `address.create`      - always value for AddressCreatePayload.topic

websiteId.description: Squarespace website id that triggered the notification.

createdOn.description: Creation date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of this message.

topic.description:
Description of the event that triggered the notification.
* `order.create`        - always value for OrderCreatePayload.topic ref
* `order.update`        - always value for OrderUpdatePayload.topic
* `extension.uninstall` - always value for ExtensionUninstallPayload.topic
* `contact.create`      - always value for ContactCreatePayload.topic
* `contact.update`      - always value for ContactUpdatePayload.topic
* `contact.delete`      - always value for ContactDeletePayload.topic
* `address.create`      - always value for AddressCreatePayload.topic
* `address.update`      - always value for AddressUpdatePayload.topic
* `address.delete`      - always value for AddressDeletePayload.topic

websiteId.description: Squarespace website id that triggered the notification.

defaultShipping.description: Whether this entry should be the default shipping address. If this is the only address book entry for the contact after creation, it becomes the default even when set to false.

CreateDiscountLineRequest.description: Array of discount line items. Describes the promotions redeemed during checkout.

CreateEmail.description: Primary email supplied when creating a contact.

decrementOperations.description: Optional; array of objects. Subtracts stock quantity for InventoryItems.

incrementOperations.description: Optional; array of objects. Increments stock quantity for InventoryItems.

setFiniteOperations.description: Optional; array of objects. Sets the exact stock quantity for InventoryItems.

setUnlimitedOperations.description: Optional; array of InventoryItem ids. Marks stock quantity as "unlimited" for the given InventoryItems.

items.description: Optional; array of InventoryItem ids. Marks stock quantity as "unlimited" for the given InventoryItems.

quantity.description: Amount of the item purchased. 1,000,000 limit.

title.description: Title of the custom line item.

variantId.description: Required if lineItemType is PHYSICAL_PRODUCT. Unique id of the ProductVariant sold.

CreateLineItemRequest.description: Array of purchased line items; cannot be empty.

CreateOrderInventoryBehavior.description: Indicates whether to deduct stock quantity for the product variant upon Order creation. Values may be DEDUCT or SKIP. Defaults to SKIP.

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string. Represents the date and time when the order was placed through the third-party sales channel.

customerEmail.description: Email address provided at checkout on the third-party sales channel.

discountLines.description: Array of discount line items. Describes the promotions redeemed during checkout.

externalOrderReference.description: Order reference identifier used by the third-party sales channel.

fulfilledOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string. Represents the moment the order was fulfilled. Required if fulfillmentStatus is FULFILLED.

fulfillments.description: Array of shipping fulfillments; up to 100 entries. Describes shipment information for the order.

lineItems.description: Array of purchased line items; cannot be empty.

shippingLines.description: Array of shipping line items. Describes the shipping options chosen at checkout. Currently accepts only one shipping entry.

carrierName.description: Name of the carrier handling the shipment.

service.description: Carrier's level of service for shipping.

shipDate.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string. Represents the moment the shipment occurred.

trackingUrl.description: URL provided by carrier to track the shipment; must adhere to valid URL formatting.

CreateOrderShipmentRequest.description: Array of shipping fulfillments; up to 100 entries. Describes shipment information for the order.

description.description: Long-form product description represented in HTML.

isVisible.description: Indicates whether the product is available for purchase. If not specified, the new product is marked as Hidden.

storePageId.description: Identifier of the product's Store Page.

tags.description: Keywords for search and organization purposes.

items.description: Keywords for search and organization purposes.

urlSlug.description: URL slug for the new product. Value can only consist of alphanumeric characters and non-contiguous hyphens.

variantAttributes.description: List of attributes to distinguish variants of the product. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

items.description: List of attributes to distinguish variants of the product. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

variants.description: List of variants of the product. Array must contain at least one object but no more than 100 objects.

additionalProperties.description: Specifies attribute-value pairs for the variant. 100 char limit per key and per value with no more than six key-value pairs. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

attributes.description: Specifies attribute-value pairs for the variant. 100 char limit per key and per value with no more than six key-value pairs. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

sku.description: Merchant-defined code that identifies the product variant. Value must be unique among variants. Leading and trailing whitespace is removed.

CreateShippingLineRequest.description: Array of shipping line items. Describes the shipping options chosen at checkout. Currently accepts only one shipping entry.

DateFilter.description: Object for filtering by before and after dates

description.description: A plain-English description of the promotion

promoCode.description: The user-entered promo code that triggered the discount

DiscountLine.description: Array of discount line items; describes the promotions redeemed during checkout.

createdOn.description: The date and time when the email was created.
Creation date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of this message.

topic.description:

* `order.create`        - always value for OrderCreatePayload.topic ref
* `order.update`        - always value for OrderUpdatePayload.topic
* `extension.uninstall` - always value for ExtensionUninstallPayload.topic
* `contact.create`      - always value for ContactCreatePayload.topic
* `contact.update`      - always value for ContactUpdatePayload.topic
* `contact.delete`      - always value for ContactDeletePayload.topic
* `address.create`      - always value for AddressCreatePayload.topic
* `address.update`      - always value for AddressUpdatePayload.topic
* `address.delete`      - always value for AddressDeletePayload.topic

websiteId.description: Squarespace website id that triggered the notification.

endpointUrl.description: HTTPS URL to POST webhook notifications.

topics.description: List of event topics that trigger a webhook notification.

items.description:
Description of the event that triggered the notification.
* `order.create`        - always value for OrderCreatePayload.topic ref
* `order.update`        - always value for OrderUpdatePayload.topic
* `extension.uninstall` - always value for ExtensionUninstallPayload.topic
* `contact.create`      - always value for ContactCreatePayload.topic
* `contact.update`      - always value for ContactUpdatePayload.topic
* `contact.delete`      - always value for ContactDeletePayload.topic
* `address.create`      - always value for AddressCreatePayload.topic
* `address.update`      - always value for AddressUpdatePayload.topic
* `address.delete`      - always value for AddressDeletePayload.topic

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the webhook subscription was created.

endpointUrl.description: HTTPS URL to POST webhook notifications.

secret.description:
Hexadecimal value used to generate a signature for a webhook notification;
field is only returned when creating a new subscription or rotating a secret.
Store the secret in a safe location to verify notifications from Squarespace.
See the 'Verifying notifications' guide under Webhooks for details.

topics.description: List of event topics that trigger a webhook notification.

items.description:
Description of the event that triggered the notification.
* `order.create`        - always value for OrderCreatePayload.topic ref
* `order.update`        - always value for OrderUpdatePayload.topic
* `extension.uninstall` - always value for ExtensionUninstallPayload.topic
* `contact.create`      - always value for ContactCreatePayload.topic
* `contact.update`      - always value for ContactUpdatePayload.topic
* `contact.delete`      - always value for ContactDeletePayload.topic
* `address.create`      - always value for AddressCreatePayload.topic
* `address.update`      - always value for AddressUpdatePayload.topic
* `address.delete`      - always value for AddressDeletePayload.topic

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the webhook subscription was last modified.

secret.description: Hexadecimal value used to generate a signature for a webhook notification; field is only returned when creating a new subscription or rotating a secret. Store the secret in a safe location to verify notifications from Squarespace.

topic.description: Required; Squarespace event topic that triggers a webhook notification. Possible values include: extension.uninstall, order.create, order.update.

statusCode.description: Status code returned by the subscribed webhook endpoint.

ExternalTransactionProperty.description: Array of properties for the payment transaction provided by the payment gateway. Properties are listed in key/value pairs.

webhookSubscriptions.description: Array of Webhook Subscription resources. If the merchant site doesn't have any webhook subscriptions, this array is empty.

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the webhook subscription was created.

endpointUrl.description: HTTPS URL that receives webhook notifications.

topics.description: List of event topics that trigger a webhook notification. Possible values include: extension.uninstall, order.create, order.update.

items.description: List of event topics that trigger a webhook notification. Possible values include: extension.uninstall, order.create, order.update.

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the webhook subscription was last modified.

label.description: The name of the form field
examples: How did you hear about us?

value.description: The value of the field, as entered by the shopper

FormItem.description: Array of form data submitted via the checkout page.

carrierName.description: Name of the carrier handling the shipment.

service.description: Carrier's level of service for shipping.

shipDate.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents the moment the fulfillment was shipped.

trackingUrl.description: URL provided by the carrier to track the shipment.

Fulfillment.description: Array of shipping fulfillments; describes shipment information for the order.

FulfillmentStatus.description: Current fulfillment status of the order. Value may be: PENDING, FULFILLED, or CANCELED.

IntegerFilter.description: Object for filtering by a min and max integer

descriptor.description: Generated description using the product's title and any available variant attributes including, but not limited to, color and size.

isUnlimited.description: Indicates whether stock is currently tracked for the item.

quantity.description: Current amount in stock, or the last known stock amount prior to becoming unlimited. This value is modified by purchases and returns only when `isUnlimited` is `false`.

sku.description: Stock keeping unit (SKU) code assigned by the Squarespace merchant for the variant; used to identify an exact variant of a product using a naming scheme preferred by the merchant.

variantId.description: The product variant id, which also serves as a unique id for the InventoryItem.

InventoryItem.description: Array of InventoryItem resources. If the merchant site doesn't have any physical or service products, this array is empty.

inventory.description: Array of InventoryItem resources. If the merchant site doesn't have any physical or service products, this array is empty.

quantity.description: Quantity value for the inventory operation.

InventoryQuantityExpression.description: Optional; array of objects. Sets the exact stock quantity for InventoryItems.

customizations.description: Array of form data submitted via a product's custom form prior to being added to the cart.

height.description: Shipping height of the physical product variant. 0.0 when not specified or when the variant is not a physical product.

imageUrl.description: URL of the primary image for the item.

length.description: Shipping length of the physical product variant. 0.0 when not specified or when the variant is not a physical product.

productId.description: Unique product id; unless null, every line item with a variantId is a variant of a product with productId.

sku.description: Stock keeping unit (SKU) code assigned by the Squarespace merchant for a variant. Null for digital products.

variantId.description: Unique id of the ProductVariant sold. Populated for physical, service, or gift card line items created on or after May 28, 2019.

variantOptions.description: Array of variant options; represents variant choices made by the customer. Null for download and gift card products.

weight.description: Shipping weight of the physical product variant. 0.0 when not specified or when the variant is not a physical product.

width.description: Shipping width of the physical product variant. 0.0 when not specified or when the variant is not a physical product.

LineItem.description: Array of purchased line items; line items describe what product or product variant was purchased, how many of that item were purchased, and additional details.

MonetaryAmount.description: A monetary amount with currency code and decimal value

channel.description: Where the order originated; possible values are: web and pos.

channelName.description: Name of the third-party sales channel.

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents the moment when the order was placed.

customerEmail.description: Email address entered at checkout or, for recurring subscription orders, the customer's current email address.

discountLines.description: Array of discount line items; describes the promotions redeemed during checkout.

externalOrderReference.description: Order reference identifier used by the third-party sales channel.

formSubmission.description: Array of form data submitted via the checkout page.

fulfilledOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents the moment the order was fulfilled.

fulfillments.description: Array of shipping fulfillments; describes shipment information for the order.

internalNotes.description: Array of internal notes added to the order by the merchant.

lineItems.description: Array of purchased line items; line items describe what product or product variant was purchased, how many of that item were purchased, and additional details.

modifiedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the order was last modified.

orderNumber.description: Unique, sequential number for the Order.

priceTaxInterpretation.description: Indicates whether lineItems.unitPricePaid includes tax. Values may be EXCLUSIVE or INCLUSIVE.

shippingLines.description: Array of shipping line items; describes the shipping options chosen at checkout.

shippingOptionName.description: the specific shipping service name selected at checkout (e.g. "USPS Ground Advantage", "Royal Mail Tracked 48").

testmode.description: If true, the order is a test order created using a payment method in test mode.

OrderCreateFulfillmentStatus.description: Current fulfillment status of the order. Value may be PENDING or FULFILLED.

OrderCreateLineItemType.description: Product type sold; values may be PHYSICAL_PRODUCT or CUSTOM.

createdOn.description: Creation date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of this message.

topic.description:
Description of the event that triggered the notification.
* `order.create`        - always value for OrderCreatePayload.topic ref
* `order.update`        - always value for OrderUpdatePayload.topic
* `extension.uninstall` - always value for ExtensionUninstallPayload.topic
* `contact.create`      - always value for ContactCreatePayload.topic
* `contact.update`      - always value for ContactUpdatePayload.topic
* `contact.delete`      - always value for ContactDeletePayload.topic
* `address.create`      - always value for AddressCreatePayload.topic
* `address.update`      - always value for AddressUpdatePayload.topic
* `address.delete`      - always value for AddressDeletePayload.topic

websiteId.description: Squarespace website id that triggered the notification.

shouldSendNotification.description: Indicates whether the customer should receive an email notification about the added shipments.

OrderNote.description: Array of internal notes added to the order by the merchant.

update.description: The type of update on the order.

createdOn.description: Creation date and time in UTC (ISO 8601 format) of this message.

topic.description:
Description of the event that triggered the notification.
* `order.create`        - always value for OrderCreatePayload.topic ref
* `order.update`        - always value for OrderUpdatePayload.topic
* `extension.uninstall` - always value for ExtensionUninstallPayload.topic
* `contact.create`      - always value for ContactCreatePayload.topic
* `contact.update`      - always value for ContactUpdatePayload.topic
* `contact.delete`      - always value for ContactDeletePayload.topic
* `address.create`      - always value for AddressCreatePayload.topic
* `address.update`      - always value for AddressUpdatePayload.topic
* `address.delete`      - always value for AddressDeletePayload.topic

websiteId.description: Squarespace website id that triggered the notification.

inventory.description: Array of InventoryItem resources. If the merchant site doesn't have any physical or service product variants, this array is empty.

documents.description: Array of Document resources. If the merchant site doesn't have any payment transactions for orders or donations, this array is empty.

cursor.description:
where next page of results begins.
should be {pagination.nextPageCursor} from previous response.

pageSize.description: number of contacts to retrieve per request

PatchContactRequest.description: Fields to update on an existing contact.

PatchEmail.description: Primary email fields for an update request.

PaymentGatewayError.description: Captures errors from the payment gateway; value is null if not applicable.

PaymentState.description: Current state of payment for the order.

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the Product was created.

description.description: Long-form product description represented in HTML.

isVisible.description: Indicates whether the product is available for purchase.

modifiedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the Product was last modified.

storePageId.description: Identifier of the product's Store Page.

tags.description: Keywords for search and organization purposes.

items.description: Keywords for search and organization purposes.

url.description: Absolute URL of the product details page.

urlSlug.description: URL slug for the new product.

variantAttributes.description: List of attributes to distinguish variants of the product. Present for PHYSICAL products only.

items.description: List of attributes to distinguish variants of the product. Present for PHYSICAL products only.

variants.description: List of variants of the product. Present for PHYSICAL and GIFT_CARD products only.

altText.description: Alt text for the image; impacts SEO and appears in search results.

availableFormats.description: Available image sizes. Use with `images.url` and a `format` query parameter to retrieve the image at a particular width.

items.description: Available image sizes. Use with `images.url` and a `format` query parameter to retrieve the image at a particular width.

orderIndex.description: Position of the image in the product's image list.

url.description: Absolute URL of the image hosted on Squarespace.

ProductImage.description: Product image assigned to the variant.

ProductMeasurements.description: Measurements of the variant when it's shipped. Present for PHYSICAL products only.

onSale.description: Indicates whether the variant is sold according to its sale price. Present for PHYSICAL products only.

ProductPricing.description: Present for DIGITAL products only. Digital products don't have variants, so pricing is at the product level.

quantity.description: Number of units that can be purchased.

unlimited.description: Indicates whether the variant has unlimited stock.

ProductStock.description: Available stock for the variant. Present for PHYSICAL products only.

ProductType.description: Product type indicator. Value may be: `PHYSICAL` or `DIGITAL`.

attributes.description: Specifies attribute-value pairs for the variant. Present for PHYSICAL products only.

sku.description: Merchant-defined code that identifies the product variant.

ProductVariant.description: List of variants of the product. Present for PHYSICAL and GIFT_CARD products only.

acceptsMarketing.description: Indicates whether the profile opted to receive marketing.

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the profile was created.

hasAccount.description: Indicates whether the profile has an account with the website.

isCustomer.description: Indicates whether the profile has any commerce orders or donations with the website.

cursor.description: The cursor for the next page of results. Use the value of `pagination.nextPageCursor` from the previous response.

pageSize.description: The number of contacts to return per request.

searchString.description: Search string for Name and Email address

sortDirection.description: Direction to sort results, ASCENDING or DESCENDING

groupBy.description: Field to group results by, should be a contactId

ShippingLine.description: Array of shipping line items; describes the shipping options chosen at checkout.

ShopperFulfillmentNotificationBehavior.description: Indicates whether to send a fulfillment notification email to the customer. Value may be SEND or SKIP.

TaxInterpretation.description: Indicates that lineItems.unitPricePaid includes tax. Values may be EXCLUSIVE or INCLUSIVE.

TransactionDiscount.description: Array of discounts for an order payment transaction; empty for donations.

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the Document was created.

customerEmail.description: Customer or donor email address. May be null for point of sale orders because email wasn't collected.

discounts.description: Array of discounts for an order payment transaction; empty for donations.

modifiedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the Document was last modified.

payments.description: Array of payment transactions for the order or donation.

salesLineItems.description: Array of sales items for an order payment transaction; empty for donations.

salesOrderId.description: Unique order id; not applicable if payment transaction is a donation.

creditCardType.description: Payment credit card type; possible values: VISA, MASTERCARD, DISCOVER, AMEX, JCB, and OTHER. null if credit card processing isn't available for the payment gateway.

externalCustomerId.description: Unique customer id for the payment transaction provided by the payment gateway. Value is null if not available.

externalTransactionId.description: Unique id for the payment transaction provided by the payment gateway.

externalTransactionProperties.description: Array of properties for the payment transaction provided by the payment gateway. Properties are listed in key/value pairs.

giftCardId.description: Unique id for a Squarespace gift card. Value is null if a gift card was not used.

paidOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the payment was made.

processingFees.description: Array of processing fees associated with the payment.

refunds.description: Array of refunds for the payment transaction.

TransactionPayment.description: Array of payment transactions for the order or donation.

exchangeRate.description: Foreign exchange rate between the payment gateway's and payment's currencies; determined when the payment is processed.

feeRefunds.description: Array of processing fee refunds for the payment.

TransactionProcessingFee.description: Array of processing fees associated with the payment.

exchangeRate.description: Foreign exchange rate between the payment gateway's and payment's currencies; determined when the payment is processed.

externalTransactionId.description: Unique id for the processing fee refund transaction provided by the payment gateway.

refundedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the processing fee refund was issued.

TransactionProcessingFeeRefund.description: Array of processing fee refunds for the payment.

externalTransactionId.description: Unique id for the refund transaction provided by the payment gateway.

refundedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents refund issue date.

TransactionRefund.description: Array of refunds for the payment transaction.

id.description: Unique id for the sales item.

taxes.description: Array of taxes for the sale item.

TransactionSalesLineItem.description: Array of sales items for an order payment transaction; empty for donations.

description.description: Description of the shipping line item as defined by the Squarespace merchant.

id.description: Unique id for the shipping line item.

taxes.description: Array of taxes for the shipping line item.

jurisdiction.description: Tax jurisdiction in COUNTRY:{value},STATE:{value},LOCAL:{value} format. Examples: COUNTRY:US, COUNTRY:US,STATE:NY, and COUNTRY:US,STATE:NY,LOCAL:10001.

name.description: Tax classification as defined by the Squarespace merchant.

rate.description: Tax rate as a percent. For example, a value of 7.00 is a 7% tax.

TransactionTax.description: Array of taxes for the shipping line item.

firstDonationSubmittedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the profile's first donation was submitted.

firstOrderSubmittedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the profile's first order was submitted.

lastDonationSubmittedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the profile's latest donation was submitted.

lastOrderSubmittedOn.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string; represents when the profile's latest order was submitted.

TransactionsSummary.description: Summary of profile's commerce transactions. If a profile has no commerce transactions, the object is still returned with null or 0 values. This information is calculated asynchronously; there may be a slight delay between when an order is created, and when it's reflected in the object.

defaultShipping.description: Whether this entry should be the default shipping address. When updating the entry that is currently the default, changing this value from true to false has no effect.

optionName.description: The name of the option (e.g. color, size, material)

value.description: The shopper-selected value for the option (e.g. red, small, cotton)

VariantOption.description: Array of variant options; represents variant choices made by the customer. Null for download and gift card products.
